name: Lavender Extract
summary: Lavender Extract is best framed as a conservative research profile with mechanistic evidence and a focus on Sleep; Stress Response; Neurobiology. Current workbook signals support mechanistic context around Neurotransmitter Modulation; Stress Response Modulation, not treatment claims.
description: Lavender Extract is best framed as a conservative research profile with mechanistic evidence and a focus on Sleep; Stress Response; Neurobiology. Current workbook signals support mechanistic context around Neurotransmitter Modulation; Stress Response Modulation, not treatment claims.
contraindications: oral oil can cause lavender burps/GI effects
dosage: 80 mg/day oral Silexan lavender oil; some studies used 160 mg/day
typical_dosage: 80 mg/day oral Silexan lavender oil; some studies used 160 mg/day
conditions: Standard anxiety/stress support where standardized oral lavender is used
buying_criteria: avoid aromatherapy products being marketed as oral anxiety evidence
